comments.author: @WorldwideLifeVentures33
comments.text: Stealing the bride at a wedding?! This travel documentary reveals mind blowing facts about life in Moldova. Discover a poor yet proud culture where an educated woman outnumbers the men!

comments.author: @NICEGLOBE05
comments.text: An absolute visual masterpiece. The drone transitions from the medieval, fairytale streets of Tallinn's Old Town to the vast, foggy wilderness of Lahemaa National Park were breathtaking. 10/10 travel journalism!

comments.text: I'm watching from Chateh Alberta Canada

replies.author: @AmazingGlobalDiscoveries
replies.text: Thank you so much for watching from Chateh, Alberta, Canada! It’s wonderful to know this Moldova journey reached you there. Hope you enjoyed discovering its traditions, people, and hidden beauty.

comments.author: @GlobalRealLifeDocumentary
comments.text: Moldova might be one of Europe's most overlooked countries, yet it has beautiful countryside, rich traditions, incredible wineries, and a fascinating history. 🇲🇩 After watching this documentary, what surprised you the most about Moldova—and do you think it's Europe's most underrated destination?

comments.author: @illuminators4194
comments.text: The first time I met people from Moldova was in Istanbul, Turkey.  They're very warm and open people. The few women I came across too were actually very beautiful ❤

replies.author: @AmazingGlobalDiscoveries
replies.text: Thank you for sharing that beautiful experience ❤ Moldovan people really do leave a warm impression, even when you meet them far from home. Their kindness, openness, and natural beauty are part of what makes Moldova so special. Have you ever had the chance to visit Moldova itself?
